title: cyrtomium abbreviatum
intro: Cyrtomium abbreviatum, also known as the short-leaf fern or abbreviated fern, is a species of fern native to Japan and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyrtomium abbreviatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Cyrtomium abbreviatum is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in modern medicine.
